zh.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle於1057年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾。她於1098年與Louis I. De Bournonville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1126年8月15日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle于1057年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾。她于1098年与Louis I. De Bournonville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1126年8月15日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Sylvie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Silvia  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle was born in 1057, in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, France. She married Louis I. De Bournonville in 1098. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 August 1126, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle est née en 1057, à Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, France. Elle a épousé Louis I. De Bournonville en 1098. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1126, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle wurde 1057 in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1098 Louis I. De Bournonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. August 1126 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle è nata il nel 1057 nel Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Lei sposato Louis I. De Bournonville nel 1098. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 agosto 1126, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelleは1057年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウルノンヴィルで生まれた。1098年にLouis I. De Bournonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1126年8月15日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle(은)는 1057년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부른빌에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1098년 Louis I. De Bournonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1126년 8월 15일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle nasceu em 1057, em Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, França. Ela casou-se com Louis I. De Bournonville em 1098. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1126, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle родилась в 1057 г. в местности бурнонвилл, пас-де-калеи, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis I. De Bournonville в 1098 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 августа 1126 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle nació en 1057, en Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Se casó con Louis I. De Bournonville en 1098. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1126, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 69 años.
